based_on: spinner/rust/crates/da-api/src/genome_encoder.rs (GenomeEntry + ProtoPayload), spinner/protocols.xml (across_v3), Across V3 SpokePool canonical mainnet deployment
intended_use: taifoon-solver estimateGas pipeline integration tests — NOT a real captured event
realistic_fields: amounts (100 USDC input, 99.85 USDC output, 15 bps spread)

deposit_id (4321987, in realistic range for mainnet Across)
